title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CMA CGM India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CMA CGM India
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Logistics Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
